trans-unit.source: Record Selection Type / Allow or Show records by selection type
All Records on selected Storage Page(s)
Target record display plugin, which will follow this plugin
Information about the Field/Value Filter Settings
Filter Field (searches through the selected field in the database)
No filtering. Resets the filter on selection.
Leave empty to always activate condition.
Post-processing of a separate query result. Result (if active) is processed with this setting if it is not set to default behavior.
Search through record title and fields
Class Name of the according model (Leave Blank for Integer-Return)
Adopt Field Values as additional options
Initial Number of records to show
List of entries for 'Per Page'-Field / Allowed entries. (Comma separated)
Pages Count to Left and Right
Default sort by genuine column value
The selected sort field is a connected Domain/Model with a separate table. Therefore it is possible to add a sub field to the sorting.

If enabled, pagination for injected records is automatically provided. See information below when enabled on which variables are available for pagination. Tonictypes also delivers a default pagination template.
Variable for items per page number
Multiple records can be shown in a list.
A single record can be shown in a detailed view.
A single record can be shown in a detailed view by regarding dynamic parameters for showing different records with a single plugin.
Show plain fluid code within the tonictypes environment (e.g. Include Variables).
Please select a plugin type in the plugin settings
No fieldtypes found. Please add the Tonictypes Static to your site-template or add at least one fieldtype (plugin.tx_tonictypes.fieldtypes)
No Storage Page is configured. Please select all Storage Pages of Records and Variables you want to use.
Use this id in the 'Target record display plugin'-Setting for Linking other Tonictypes plugins to this list!
Please save record in order to continue.
Path Segment '%s' already exists. Unique segment was created.
Sorry, creating new records is not allowed by this plugin!
Sorry, editing records is not allowed by this plugin!
Sorry, deleting records is not allowed by this plugin!
The Tonictypes Extension had to clear the cache to reload all fieldtypes. If there are no fieldtypes available, please try to clear the caches manually.
No markers were found on the configured storage page(s).
The base record has a new field and therefore that base record needs to be updated before.
See TCA Reference for more information.
If you need additional support, you can contact us by the following email address.
Hide Records of this type in lists
Hide Button to Add new Record
Pretends to be an empty value
Please select a datatype to continue
Please configure tabs and assign fields in the datatype
Record not found for this datatype.
Please enter a frontend label for the field.
This field doesn't support different field value types. Please add a fixed value!
This fieldtype doesn't support dynamic database values.
This fieldtype doesn't support database and dynamic database values.
The field '%s' has no field values. Please add at least one field value!
There is currently no inline configuration available for this field type!
Datatype does not contain fields. Please add fields to this datatype.
Record with Id '%s' was successfully deleted.
Variable with Id '%s' was successfully deleted.
Could not delete Record with Id '%s'.
Field with Id '%s' and according record values were successfully deleted.
FieldValue with Id '%s' and according record values were successfully deleted.
The field '%s' is required. Please fill out all values.
The inline element only works with database field values.
The database element only works with database field values.
This plugin is not yet configured.
Record is now hidden. Please fix the displayed errors first and then remove the 'Hide'-Check.
Attach Values from Database for Frontend
The Form-Value is accessible in frontend with the following fluid code:
The search requires minimum of %s characters.
A field class '%s' does not exist!
Single Value of a comma-separated List (FIND_IN_SET)
Value that is not between two values (BETWEEN)
Please regard the selection limit of %s entries.
BOOLEAN (Set true/false type for this variable)
INTEGER (Set numeric type for this variable)
FLOAT (Set floating number type for this variable)
STRING (Set alphanumeric type for this variable)
ARRAY (Set array type for this variable)
OBJECT (Set object type for this variable)
This module manages records of different type. You can easily manage or add records to the selected page.
There are %s records on this page
There are %s datatypes on this page
Create a new record on this page
No records were found on this page.
No datatypes were found on this page.
Do you really want to delete the record?
Please click on an entry in the following table to open details for the selected entry.
Please select a page in the pagetree.
Please select a page from the pagetree, where the imported records will be stored.
Please select the target datatype for the imported records. This datatype is used for assigning the data of the imported file.
Please select the CSV-File from your computer. The file is uploaded once into a temporary directory and will be deleted from the server after the import is finished.
Please assign the columns from the CSV-File to the according field of the datatype. All data of this column will be imported to the selected field if the validation is passed.
Thank you for using the Tonictypes CSV-Import. The final log is displayed in the following lines.
First Line is Header with column names
No file given. Please select a file to continue.
The selected file is empty or cannot be read. Please try again!
Import Records with failed validation (as hidden)
Recursive Include Record Storage Pages of selected pages
Unknown Error. There was an error, requesting table data. Please try again or change the table name.
Table '%s' needs an update to sync all fields with columns.
Do you want to create the table?

The table '%s' has passed the integrity comparison. It is therefore up to date with the current status of the mapped fields that are assigned to the datatype. You can repeat the check as soon as you have added new fields or made changes to the datatype.
This table exists in the database but the TCA file is missing.
TCA file was not generated/updated automatically (%s). Please run create/update table again or check folder permissions.
Unknown Error. There was an error getting available class data.
Class '%s' needs an update to sync all fields with variables.
Do you want to create the class?
The '%s'-class corresponds to the assigned fields and therefore does not require updating. If you make changes to the datatype or assigned fields, you can perform the check again.
Datatype with uid '%s' could not be loaded!
Displaying Record with Uid '%s' is not allowed by this plugin!
